title: Kanmani Anbudan
description: Anbu is overwhelmed with joy as the judges declare him the winner and rushes to Kanmani with the news. Later, his heart speaks the truth as he realises he cannot live without her.

title: Thendrale Mella Pesu
description: Facing Paraman's suspicion, Kalamma takes a drastic step by drinking poison. Later, he painfully tells his friends that Kalamma acts falsely and hides the truth from him.

title: Suttum Vizhi Sudare
description: Abinaya faints during Vetri's Diwali celebrations. Later, she returns his gift but saves him from a falling stone, prompting a confused Vetri to question her.

title: Thaai Maaman
description: Delighted by her daughter's support against her husband, Pechi expresses her gratitude to Poongodi. Later, Poongodi firmly refuses to go to college on Azhagar's bike.

title: Sindhu Bairavi
description: Arumugam tries to impress Bairavi on Annapurani's advice. Meanwhile, Mahalakshmi's plan backfires when the dirty water lands on Aishwarya instead.

title: Azhagae Azhagu
description: After Lakshmi condemns Revathi's remarks, Raghavan slams Thangaraj's actions. Revathi strikes back by revealing his allegations against his mother, leaving him shocked.

title: Pandian Stores 2
description: After cancer treatment, Muthuvel refuses the doctor's advice to stay in the hospital. Soon, he falls seriously ill while Sakthivel drives Kathir away despite his efforts to help.

title: Ayyanar Thunai
description: Cheran lashes out at Nadesan for drinking and ruining their household plans, refusing to trust his promise to quit. Then, Pallavan joins Cheran on his visit to Chandayatha.

title: Siragadikka Aasai
description: Muthu consoles a worried Meena after Vijaya's harsh comments. Later, Muthu and Ravi question Manoj about arranging five lakhs, with Meena supporting them.

title: Chinna Marumagal
description: Tamizhselvi and the Panchayat wait to exchange the twins. Frustrated by Sethupathi's absence, the Panchayat promises to take strict action against him.

title: Kadhal Kadhal Kadhal
description: Karikalan is furious over Saranya's reception dance. Meanwhile, Rajesh's unusual behaviour at the wedding exposes a shocking truth about his mental health condition.

title: Onna Irukka Kaththukanum
description: Murugan's alliance faces constant rejections as Kandhasamy questions prospective brides about cooking. Later, Kandhasamy clashes with Indhira over a family dispute.
